overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting vibrant cyan and magenta neon lights from towering commercial buildings with holographic advertisements. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing high-end cinematic rendering with ray-traced reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from behind a hedge on a futuristic city sidewalk at night. The camera begins walking forward along wet pavement, passing palm trees while observing the neon-lit street. A black sedan drives past on the reflective asphalt road, and towering commercial buildings with bright vertical billboards dominate the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open street into a covered area approaching a luxury building entrance. The camera walks past large glass doors with gold trim and potted bamboo plants. The environment becomes more sheltered under a building canopy with cyan neon strip lighting, while the wet marble floor reflects the ambient lights. A pedestrian walks by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial promenade with bank and holographic advertisements

slowing pace while approaching group of pedestrians near vertical garden wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, passing the Maximus Bank and approaching pedestrians near a holographic display

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the covered commercial walkway past the illuminated Maximus Bank sign. The camera moves along a reflective water feature while approaching pedestrians gathered near a vertical garden wall with white lighting. Holographic advertisements float in the air on the right side, and the wet marble pavement continues to reflect the vibrant cyan and magenta neon lights from the surrounding architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, rain-slicked city sidewalk into the sheltered, opulent entrance of a luxury commercial complex. It begins behind a hedge, moving forward past palm trees and a passing black sedan while towering vertical billboards cast vibrant neon glows across the wet asphalt. As the camera advances, the open street transitions into a covered canopy area, shifting the terrain from asphalt to reflective marble floors accented by gold-trimmed glass doors and cyan neon strip lighting. The scene then expands along a sophisticated walkway, passing a glowing Maximus Bank sign and a reflective water feature. Finally, the movement leads toward a vertical garden wall and floating holographic advertisements, where the surrounding architecture bathes the wet pavement in deep cyan and magenta light.
